heading: Today
text: A few patches of morning fog, then sunshine, mixed with some clouds.  A bit breezy, and seasonably cool.  Highs ranging through the 70s, closer to 70 over the higher terrain north.  Winds light from the southwest, becoming west near 10 mph, a few gusts to 25 mph from the Green Mountains east.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear and cool.  Patches of river valley fog.  Lows in the 40s to low 50s, some mid 50s near Lake Champlain.  Winds diminishing to light and variable, except southwest in the Champlain Valley near 10 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly sunny and warmer.  Highs in the 70s to low 80s.  Winds light, becoming south less than 10 mph.
